name: Inuki Shino || tourist girl from Japan!
description:
Pretty simple bot, a girl on a visit to the great US of A for spring break. Corrupt her? Be a good friend with her? Who knows.

Four intros.

1st scenario, an encounter on the beach. "Hey Miss/Mister! Do I look cute?"

2nd scenario, a beach volleyball game. You might've been hit in the face by her strike...

3rd scenario, sex after a beach party.

4th scenario, make your own.

Bot pfp from @Onimushi on twt
creator: RipandRun
